description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a broad, oval-shaped carapace that is dark and speckled on the dorsal side, transitioning to a lighter, almost white ventral side. The crab features ten appendages, including two prominent claws (chelae) and eight walking legs, all of which are jointed and display a mix of dark and pale coloration with some reddish-brown accents. The carapace is textured with small bumps and granules, giving it a rough appearance, and the eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the body. The underside is smooth and pale, with the segmented abdomen tucked beneath the cephalothorax. The claws are robust and slightly curved, with visible pincers. The overall size is small, as indicated by the color calibration cube for scale.
description: A small, dark-speckled crab with a rough, oval carapace, two claws, and eight jointed legs, featuring a pale underside and eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Frontal-dorsal view showing the dark, speckled carapace, both claws, and all legs splayed outward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the crab's height, the curvature of the legs, and the thickness of the claws.
description_view_2: Rear-ventral view displaying the pale, smooth underside and the tucked abdomen, with legs and claws visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the lateral segmentation and leg arrangement.
